title: DocIndex
description: A document ownership and visibility index record stored in 'docIndex', keyed by 'docIndex:{userId}:{app}:{docKey}'.

app.description: Application name that owns the document

visibility.description: Access visibility level for the document

sharedWith.description: Explicit per-user, per-app share list (used when visibility is 'shared')

userId.description: UUID of the user who has access

app.description: Application namespace the share is scoped to

shareToken.description: UUID share token for public access; null when public sharing is not enabled
